description: Colour happy id shoes balanced with a darker, prominent colour, has a leather upper, with a go-anywhere appeal. Crafted from the finest materials, this low-top pair is perfect for colour-pop styling - a summer staple. Balance this piece with understated denims or pleated chinos for contemporary grounding. Comes with a spare set of laces. Upper Low-top leather upper with fabric and suede overlays Contrast stitch detailing Central lace-ups Suede tongue and fabric lining Midsole Rubber midsole with reinforced textured foxing on the heel Outsole Textured rubber outsole with curved groove lines shoe care Wipe with a dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight
